business_problem: Cainiao, Alibaba's logistics arm, had to fulfill its mission of 24-hour domestic and 72-hour international delivery in the world's most populous country, where the biggest logistics challenge was data cooperation across recipients, business owners, and freight companies, plus reaching even the most remote rural areas.
solution_summary: Cainiao's logistics cloud platform processes over 9 trillion data points daily across warehouses, delivery centers, and IoT-enabled endpoints to orchestrate 24-hour domestic and 72-hour international package delivery at scale. The platform ingests IoT sensor data from delivery lockers, fulfillment centers, and last-mile hubs, applies machine learning algorithms to optimize routing and predict demand, and exposes real-time tracking through public cloud portals serving three primary customer segments. The infrastructure supports five parallel logistics networks processing over 50 billion kilometers of daily delivery routes, enabling seamless data collaboration among shipping partners, warehouses, and 3,000+ global logistics affiliates.
business_outcome: Cainiao's fulfillment network grew 170% year-over-year, achieved 98% on-time delivery, tracks packages in 224 countries and regions with 100+ warehouses and 3,000+ global partners, processes 9 trillion data points per day, calculates 80%+ of routes algorithmically across 50B+ km/day, and saves an estimated 260M hours of delivery time per day.
metrics: 3,000+ global partners and 3 million delivery personnel
9 trillion+ data points processed per day
50 billion+ km delivery distance per day
260 million hours of delivery time saved per day
architecture_clues: Public cloud portal "Link" as logistics information platform
Five networks: express couriers, warehouses, last-mile, global, rural
IoT-enabled delivery lockers and unmanned logistics centers
ML for route optimization, address standardization, volume forecasting
evidence_quotes: Their fulfillment network alone has increased exponentially to yearly growth of 170 percent. Adding to business improvements, consumer experience has also improved, with Cainiao's help and mainly due to their ever-increasing cloud network, Cainiao boasts an on-time delivery rate of 98 percent.

Internationally, Cainiao's use of the cloud has enabled the business unit to post some incredible numbers including forging partnerships with over 3,000 global partners and three million delivery personnel.
By leveraging state-of-the-art cloud technology in the logistics field, it has been estimated that Cainiao helps save 260 million hours a day in delivery time.

solution_components.name: Alibaba Cloud IaaS
solution_components.role: Foundational compute and network infrastructure for global logistics operations across five logistics networks

solution_components.name: Machine Learning Algorithms
solution_components.role: Route optimization, demand forecasting, and delivery time prediction across logistics networks

solution_components.name: Internet of Things
solution_components.role: Sensor-based tracking and remote operation of delivery lockers, fulfillment hubs, and autonomous logistics systems

solution_components.name: Cloud Data Platform
solution_components.role: Data management infrastructure enabling real-time sharing among couriers, warehouses, and logistics partners

data_flow: IoT sensors (delivery lockers, warehouse tracking, last-mile hubs) → cloud data platform → ML route algorithms → fulfillment execution → real-time tracking portal
integration_points: Self-collection hubs and community service centers
